detail.zhHant: Set out Chickpeas, Flatbread, Zucchini, Curry paste, Garlic, warm the staple or bread, and cut the vegetables into pieces that fit cleanly in two bowls, wraps, or plates.
detail.yue: Set out Chickpeas, Flatbread, Zucchini, Curry paste, Garlic, warm the staple or bread, and cut the vegetables into pieces that fit cleanly in two bowls, wraps, or plates.
detail.en: Set out Chickpeas, Flatbread, Zucchini, Curry paste, Garlic, warm the staple or bread, and cut the vegetables into pieces that fit cleanly in two bowls, wraps, or plates.

detail.zhHant: Cook Chickpeas in a hot pan until savory and fully heated, then move it to a plate so the fresh ingredients stay crisp during assembly.
detail.yue: Cook Chickpeas in a hot pan until savory and fully heated, then move it to a plate so the fresh ingredients stay crisp during assembly.
detail.en: Cook Chickpeas in a hot pan until savory and fully heated, then move it to a plate so the fresh ingredients stay crisp during assembly.

detail.zhHant: Build each portion with the staple first, then vegetables, sauce, and Chickpeas; keep wet sauces away from the bread edge until serving.
detail.yue: Build each portion with the staple first, then vegetables, sauce, and Chickpeas; keep wet sauces away from the bread edge until serving.
detail.en: Build each portion with the staple first, then vegetables, sauce, and Chickpeas; keep wet sauces away from the bread edge until serving.
